visual_design.justification: CHANGELOG formatting consistent with established pattern. Subsections, bold feature IDs, stats block all present.

code_quality.justification: All JSON valid, no version mismatches, release.json schema preserved, sales suite bumped from 1.0.0 to 2.3.0 correctly.

README shows 3 plugins, all JSON valid

non_blocking_issues: Git tag v2.3.0 deferred to post-commit

craft.justification: JSON valid throughout, CHANGELOG formatting matches established pattern, version numbering follows semver.
